cases.description: SDK import alias call is canonicalized and owned by its function.
Nested ArkUI component occurrences retain declaration owners.
Host, field, and builder decorators attach to distinct owners.
Async, Promise, await, try/catch, and arrow syntax retain exact offsets.
Same-name UI occurrences on one line remain unique by UTF-16 offsets.
A multiline import is one region with exact binding occurrences.
A parameter shadowing an SDK import prevents a false exact API occurrence.
Field reads and writes are distinguished and owned by the containing method/UI node.
A resource API in a field initializer is owned by the field region.
Multiline modifier occurrences stay attached to the leaf Text UI owner.
A sibling @Styles decorator belongs to the following method only.
Comments/strings do not create APIs while ERROR and missing recovery stay local.
A preceding emoji proves UTF-16 offsets while import use, resource/string, and a local helper call remain distinct exact facts.
A class field region and method preserve class ownership and exact field access.
Top-level imported calls remain explicitly owner-unresolved instead of receiving a fabricated owner.
